mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.image_url, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho) AS author_unit, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.board_id AND c.is_deleted = 0) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE b.board_id = #{id} AND b.is_deleted = 0

SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.image_url, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at, b.is_deleted, u.name AS author_name, CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho) AS author_unit, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.board_id AND c.is_deleted = 0) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE b.board_id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (user_id, category, title, content, image_url) VALUES (#{userId}, #{req.category}, #{req.title}, #{req.content}, #{req.imageUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{req.title}, content = #{req.content}, image_url = #{req.imageUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{req.boardId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE board SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.image_url, b.view_count, b.created_at, u.name AS author_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.board_id AND c.is_deleted = 0) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.is_deleted = 0 AND b.category != 'NOTICE' ORDER BY b.view_count DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT b.board_id, b.user_id, b.category, b.title, b.content, b.image_url, b.view_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, CONCAT(h.dong, ' ', h.ho) AS author_unit, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.board_id AND c.is_deleted = 0) AS comment_count FROM board b JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN household h ON u.household_id = h.household_id WHERE b.is_deleted = 0 AND b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE is_deleted = 0
